## What does this PR do?

Brief summary of the change.

## Why?

Motivation and/or the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #123").

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Ran the server and exercised the change manually

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
